description: Malformed map literal (§59.3). The literal [ "DAL": ] has a depth-1 entry-colon but a missing value. A map literal with a depth-1 colon and a missing key/value, trailing colon, or count error is E-MAP-LITERAL-MALFORMED (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §59.3 a malformed map literal (depth-1 colon with a missing key or value, odd/even-count error, or trailing colon) is E-MAP-LITERAL-MALFORMED.
